statement.en: Fostering Engagement through a Latency-Optimized LLM-based Dialogue System for Multimodal ECA Responses - Supplemental Material

proposer: Kühlem, Konstantin W., Ehret, Jonathan, Kuhlen, Torsten W. et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes a future-dated (2026-04-25) technical system combining LLM, dialogue optimization, and embodied conversational agents. It is provisional pending peer validation, empirical benchmarking, and real-world deployment. The work proposes engineering constraints (latency optimization) applied to an emerging architecture (multimodal ECA + LLM). Truth-value depends on: (1) reproducibility of latency claims, (2) engagement metrics validation, (3) generalization across modalities. Classification as FLOWING reflects pre-validation status and iterative refinement typical of supplemental materials.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遅延が消えるとき、政治的な関与が呼吸するように生まれる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心から四方へ同時に放たれる声——遅れない対話の星図。
